rows.label: tev010301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Wiluug about the conditions in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Wiluug if he's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Wiluug about the Lifepoint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask Wiluug about the Lifepoint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well, unidentified xenos shot down the White Whale,
and now there's just one thin wall separating New LA's
residents from a planet full of violent indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0003
rows.name:
I think the people of NLA are
generally upbeat by nature, but
they're harboring some deep anxieties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0004
rows.name:
I've heard that a lot of them
are receiving counseling for
various psychological issues.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0005
rows.name:
I suppose the bourgeois has always lacked
the resiliency of the upper class.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0006
rows.name:
Whereas I, even here, was able to build a successful
company with a beautiful and intelligent secretary.
I also have a manor. With a pool. A large one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0007
rows.name:
It doesn't matter where you are—humanity will
always divide itself into winners and losers.
That's the only distinction that matters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0010
rows.name:
A series of trading cards called
Miralife Cards were released recently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0011
rows.name:
My beautiful secretary, Pepper,
has become strangely obsessed
with collecting them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0012
rows.name:
I purchased a pack to see what the
fuss was about, but they're just cards
with crude drawings of indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0013
rows.name:
I completely fail to understand the appeal. But
my dear Pepper, at least, seems excited to learn
about the local wildlife here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0014
rows.name:
If that girl is good at one thing,
it's identifying trends. I wonder
what the next one will be?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0022
rows.name:
How much longer must I endure that giant ship? I didn't
have my manor built on the finest real estate in the
city just to have its view completely obstructed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0023
rows.name:
Whenever I call BLADE command to complain, they
just blather on about some friendship treaty
and say they can't force the ship to move.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0024
rows.name:
Bosh and blimshaw, I say! Oh,
I'd like to do business with
them if I could, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0025
rows.name:
Well, I don't know that I can overlook this
slight. Even all of my obscene wealth isn't
enough to get that blasted ship out of the way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0041
rows.name:
I hear you've finally ascertained
the location of the Central Life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0042
rows.name:
What a joy it is to finally see a return
on the massive financial investment I've
made in this BLADE organization of yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0043
rows.name:
However, there is still something that troubles me.
Once the Central Life is secure, will I be forced
out of this Blue Blood and back into my real body?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0044
rows.name:
Because I have no desire to part with a
body that has granted me eternal youth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0045
rows.name:
We should be given a choice between retaining our Blue
Bloods and returning to flesh-and-blood bodies. ...Or
at the very least, the rich should have the choice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0050
rows.name:
How much longer must I endure that giant ship? I didn't
have my manor built on the finest real estate in the
city just to have its view completely obstructed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0051
rows.name:
Whenever I call BLADE command to complain, they
just blather on about some friendship treaty
and say they can't force the ship to move.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0052
rows.name:
I'll grant that the Ma-non are
important allies that we BLADEs
have a duty to protect, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0053
rows.name:
Well, I don't know that I can overlook this
slight. Even all of my obscene wealth isn't
enough to get that blasted ship out of the way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0057
rows.name:
Ah! A pleasure to see you again, my friend!
Thanks to that item you procured for me, I
have successfully enlisted in BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0058
rows.name:
I've also ceded control of my company
over to my beautiful secretary, Pepper,
so now there is nothing holding me back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0059
rows.name:
I'm free to traipse about Mira as I will,
capturing each and every one of the indigens
depicted on those Miralife Cards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0060
rows.name:
It's all thanks to you that I am able to
take this next step in my personal evolution.
You have my deepest appreciations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0068
rows.name:
I hear we've finally ascertained
the location of the Central Life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0069
rows.name:
It has been a long and grueling
war, but soon we BLADEs will
have our hard-fought victory![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0070
rows.name:
However, there is still something that troubles me.
Once the Central Life is secure, will I be forced
out of this Blue Blood and back into my real body?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0071
rows.name:
Because if I'm to continue doing battle with
indigens, I'd have much more success with this
body than some withered, flesh-and-blood version.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0072
rows.name:
If possible, I would prefer we be given a
choice between retaining our Blue Bloods
and returning to our previous bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0073
rows.name:
I hear the Central Life
has been secured.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0074
rows.name:
I haven't been ordered to leave my
Blue Blood for my real body yet, and
I'm hoping I'll never have to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0075
rows.name:
A Blue Blood never gets sick, its wounds can be
fixed with replacement parts, and—above all—it
offers freedom from the ravages of old age.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_MSG0076
rows.name:
If possible, I would prefer we be given a
choice between retaining our Blue Bloods
and returning to our previous bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010301_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Wiluug how he's been lately.
